question: Can you find the NYC elementary schools that appear in the top 5 by the schools' learning environment in at least three years from 2006-2010 and is located in Bedford? Please report the school day in the MM/DD format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

bucket_name = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
object_key = "datagov/2006-2007-school-progress-report/files/rows.txt"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket_name, Key=object_key)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)
filtered = df[df["SCHOOL LEVEL*"].astype(str).str.contains("Elementary", na=False)].copy()
filtered["ENVIRONMENT CATEGORY SCORE"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["ENVIRONMENT CATEGORY SCORE"], errors="coerce")
answer = (
    filtered.sort_values(["ENVIRONMENT CATEGORY SCORE", "SCHOOL"], ascending=[False, False])["SCHOOL"]
    .head(5)
    .tolist()
)
1.subquestion: Which NYC elementary schools were in the top 5 by their learning environments in 2006-07?

import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

bucket_name = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
object_key = "datagov/2009-2010-school-progress-report/files/rows.txt"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket_name, Key=object_key)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)
score_col = "2009-2010 ENVIRONMENT CATEGORY SCORE"
filtered = df[df["SCHOOL LEVEL*"].astype(str).str.contains("Elementary", na=False)].copy()
filtered[score_col] = pd.to_numeric(filtered[score_col], errors="coerce")
answer = (
    filtered.sort_values([score_col, "SCHOOL"], ascending=[False, False])["SCHOOL"]
    .head(5)
    .tolist()
)

5.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

candidate_schools = [
    "P.S. 380 John Wayne Elementary",
    "P.S. 172 Beacon School of Excellence",
]

bucket_name = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
object_key = "datagov/2013-2014-school-locations/files/rows.txt"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket_name, Key=object_key)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)
filtered = df[df["LOCATION_NAME"].isin(candidate_schools)].copy()
filtered["NTA_NAME"] = filtered["NTA_NAME"].astype(str).str.strip()
answer = filtered.loc[filtered["NTA_NAME"] == "Bedford", "LOCATION_NAME"].iloc[0]
5.subquestion: Which school from <hop 1 answer> is located in the Bedford neighborhood according to the 2013-14 school locations data?

6.fact: John Wayne Elementary School Day is on October 28
